sections.paragraph:
Original: שׁירה שׁיר

Transliteration: shı̂yr shı̂yrâh

Phonetic: sheer

BDB Definition:

  1. song (noun masculine)
    1. lyric song
    2. religious song
    3. song of Levitical choirs
  2. song (noun feminine)
    1. song, ode

Origin: from H7891

TWOT entry: 2378a,2378b

Part(s) of speech:
